messages.author: Serge
messages.text: The idea is to create the basis for very low power, push based sensor nodes which consume minimal power. They are NOT always on devices and their job is to wake up, sample some data and send it and sleep. I have tried to incorporate some "best practices" to make this scalable and safe of the Mesh. The README is the best place to get an idea where I am going with this. I have a node running this firmware but many features are still un-tested, I just wanted to get my thoughts in code. It currently build against my own slightly modified fork of MeshCore 1.10.0 (this may turn out not to be needed). https://github.com/ssozonoff/sleepy_sensor
